testcase.name: test_save_performance_success
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_performance_tracking.py:280: in saved_record_id assert response.status_code == 200, f"Save failed: {response.status_code} - {response.text}" E AssertionError: Save failed: 400 - {"detail":"Cannot edit an approved record"} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.error: backend/tests/test_performance_tracking.py:280: in saved_record_id assert response.status_code == 200, f"Save failed: {response.status_code} - {response.text}" E AssertionError: Save failed: 400 - {"detail":"Cannot edit an approved record"} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.error: backend/tests/test_performance_tracking.py:280: in saved_record_id assert response.status_code == 200, f"Save failed: {response.status_code} - {response.text}" E AssertionError: Save failed: 400 - {"detail":"Cannot edit an approved record"} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.error: backend/tests/test_performance_tracking.py:280: in saved_record_id assert response.status_code == 200, f"Save failed: {response.status_code} - {response.text}" E AssertionError: Save failed: 400 - {"detail":"Cannot edit an approved record"} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_cannot_edit_approved_record
